MASTER CALENDAR JURY

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE

MINI MINUTES: Judge: Richard Ulmer; Clerk NBautista ; Not Reported. (D218)
Appearances:
Plaintiff, Tipton Management Company is present. Represented by Niko Devries.
Attorney, Jak Marquez, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Desislava Baeva, is present.
Attorney, Tracey Merwise, representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Koorosh Afshari, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 207, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.
This case settled, the trial date of AUG-30-2010 is vacated.

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
